confirmation.subject: Reservation at {restaurantName} — {date} {time}
confirmation.heading: Your reservation is confirmed.
confirmation.lede: Hello, {guestName} — here are your booking details.
confirmation.reminderText: Please arrive a few minutes early and let the host know you booked through Tavli.

reminder.subject: Tomorrow at {restaurantName}
reminder.heading: See you tomorrow.
reminder.lede: Hello, {guestName} — a friendly reminder about your reservation tomorrow.
reminder.cancelHint: Can't make it? Cancel with one click to free up the table.
reminder.footer: You are receiving this email because you have a reservation through Tavli.

postVisit.subject: How was {restaurantName}?
postVisit.preview: One tap leaves an anonymous rating — first name only.
postVisit.heading: How was {restaurantName}?
postVisit.lede: Hello, {firstName} — one tap is all we need. Your rating stays anonymous (first name only) and helps the next diner.
postVisit.instructionText: Tap a star above. You will land on a page where you can add a comment if you like — or just submit and you're done.

partnerAlert.subject: New reservation — {restaurantName} · {date} {time}
partnerAlert.heading: New reservation — {restaurantName}
partnerAlert.manageText: Manage the reservation in your partner dashboard (cancel / mark as seated / mark as no-show).

partnerCancelled.subject: Reservation cancelled at {restaurantName}
partnerCancelled.heading: Reservation cancelled.
partnerCancelled.lede: Hello, {guestName} — unfortunately your reservation at {restaurantName} for {prettyDate} at {time} ({partySize} {guestsLabel}) has been cancelled.
partnerCancelled.apologyText: We are sorry for the inconvenience. You are welcome to rebook at any time.
